html-elements-challenge.title: Create a Web Page Structure
html-elements-challenge.instructions:
Create a simple web page with the following requirements: 1. An

heading with the text "My Web Page" 2. An

subheading with the text "Welcome" 3. A paragraph (

) with any text 4. A element inside the paragraph to bold some text
html-elements-challenge.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <title>My Web Page</title>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- Write your code here -->
  
</body>
</html>

validationRules.errorMessage: Missing <h1> heading. Add an <h1> element with your main title.
The <h1> heading should contain the text "My Web Page".
Missing <h2> subheading. Add an <h2> element with the text "Welcome".

Missing paragraph. Add a

element with some text.

Missing inside your paragraph. Wrap some text in tags inside your

.

html-lists-challenge.title: Build a Navigation with Lists
html-lists-challenge.instructions:
Create a page with:
1. An <h1> heading with text "My Favorite Things"
2. An unordered list (<ul>) with exactly 3 list items (<li>)
3. An ordered list (<ol>) with exactly 3 list items (<li>)
4. A link (<a>) with href="https://google.com" and text "Visit Google"
html-lists-challenge.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <title>Lists and Links</title>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- Build your lists and links here -->
  
</body>
</html>

validationRules.errorMessage: Missing <h1> heading.
Your unordered list (<ul>) should have exactly 3 <li> items.
Your ordered list (<ol>) should have exactly 3 <li> items.
Add a link (<a>) with href="https://google.com".

html-project-challenge.title: Build a Personal Profile Page
html-project-challenge.instructions:
Build a complete personal profile page with:
1. Proper HTML5 structure (DOCTYPE, html, head, body)
2. A <header> element containing an <h1> with your name
3. A <nav> element with at least 3 links (<a>)
4. A <main> element containing:
   - A <section> with an 'About Me' heading (<h2>) and a paragraph
   - A <section> with a 'Skills' heading (<h2>) and an unordered list with at least 4 items
5. A <footer> element with a paragraph
html-project-challenge.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>My Profile</title>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- Build your profile page here -->
  
</body>
</html>

validationRules.errorMessage: Add a <header> element containing an <h1> with your name.
Add a <nav> element for navigation.
Your <nav> should contain at least 3 links (<a> elements). Currently checking for exactly 3.
Add a <main> element for primary content.
Add at least one <section> inside <main>.
Add <h2> subheadings inside your main content sections.
Add an unordered list (<ul>) for your skills.
Add a <footer> element at the bottom of your page.

html-table-structure-challenge.title: Create a Structured HTML Table
html-table-structure-challenge.instructions: Build an HTML table with a header row and 3 data rows. Include columns: Name, Age, City.
html-table-structure-challenge.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <title>Table Challenge</title>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- Add your table here -->
</body>
</html>

validationRules.errorMessage: Add a <table> element.
Add a <thead> with a header row.
Your table should include exactly 3 data rows inside <tbody>.
First header cell should be 'Name'.

html-responsive-nav-challenge.title: Build a Responsive Navigation Bar
html-responsive-nav-challenge.instructions: Create a responsive nav bar with at least 4 links. Use a <nav> element and CSS classes, and make sure link color changes on hover.
html-responsive-nav-challenge.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <title>Responsive Nav</title>
  <style>
    /* Add your CSS here */
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- Add your navigation bar here -->
</body>
</html>

validationRules.errorMessage: Add a <nav> element for the navigation bar.
Add at least 4 <a> links inside <nav>.
Set nav display to flex for responsiveness.
Add hover color styling to links (e.g., blue).

html-css-card-challenge.instructions: Create a stylized card with a title, image placeholder, and description. Apply background, border-radius, and box-shadow.

<head>
  <title>CSS Card</title>
  <style>
    /* Card styles */
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- Card markup -->
</body>
</html>

validationRules.errorMessage: Create an element with class 'card'.
Add a <h2> title inside the card.
Set card border-radius (e.g. 10px).
Add a box-shadow on card (non-empty value).

Add a 'name' text input.
Add a required email input.
Add a message textarea.
Make message textarea required.

python-calculator-challenge.title: Build a Simple Calculator
python-calculator-challenge.instructions:
Write a Python function called `calculate(a, b, op)` that takes two numbers and an operator ('+', '-', '*', '/') and returns the result.

Note: If division by zero occurs, return 'Error'.

Run this fully in the browser via our secure code execution sandbox!
python-calculator-challenge.testCode:
import sys

try:
    assert calculate(5, 3, '+') == 8, '5 + 3 should be 8'
    assert calculate(10, 2, '-') == 8, '10 - 2 should be 8'
    assert calculate(4, 3, '*') == 12, '4 * 3 should be 12'
    assert calculate(15, 3, '/') in [5.0, 5], '15 / 3 should be 5.0'
    assert calculate(5, 0, '/') == 'Error', 'Division by zero should return "Error"'
    print('TESTS_PASSED')
except AssertionError as e:
    print(str(e))
    sys.exit(1)
except Exception as e:
    print('Code error:', str(e))
    sys.exit(1)
